records.ety: [Sp. matador, prop., a killer, fr. matar to kill, L. mactare to sacrifice, kill.]

defs: The killer; the man appointed to kill the bull in bullfights; a bullfighter; a toreador.

In the game of quadrille or omber, the three principal trumps, the ace of spades being the first, the ace of clubs the third, and the second being the deuce of a black trump or the seven of a red one.
quotes: When Lady Tricksey played a four, You took it with a matadore.

defs: The jack of clubs, or any other trump held in sequence with it, whether by the player or by his adversaries.
A certain game of dominoes in which four dominoes (the 4-3, 5-2, 6-1, and double blank), called matadors, may be played at any time in any way.
